programme.desc: S1 , E49 : Lokenath Brahmachari, also known as Baba Lokenath, is a Hindu saint and mystic who lives in Bengal in the 18th and 19th century and works towards the betterment of the society.

programme.title: Mon Mayuree
programme.desc: Priyo and Urmy are lovers who get separated due to the twisted ways of fate. Years later, when they meet each other, Priyo decides to help Urmy as she leads a troubled married life.

programme.title: Porinaam
programme.desc: Raghu falls in love with Nisha, but her father opposes their union. To gain his approval, Raghu decides to enter her house disguised as a servant.

programme.title: Ekai Eksho
programme.desc: Ratan, an honest autorickshaw driver, refuses to help a corrupt politician, Pradip Roy, which then leads to a local war. He also ends up falling in love with Jhilik, his daughter.

programme.title: Pratisodh
programme.desc: Ranjan is sent to jail under false allegations by his uncle. However, he strives to take revenge and teach his uncle a lesson.

programme.title: 100 Percent Love
programme.desc: Competitive peers Balu and Mahalakshmi have ego clashes while in college. When they meet again after a few years, they try to outdo each other until they realise that they are in love.

programme.title: Dan Protidan
programme.desc: Ashok becomes distraught following the demise of his wife. In a bid to usurp his wealth, Dilip, Ashok's cousin, takes advantage of the situation and begins to torture him.

programme.title: Pita
programme.desc: An honest motor mechanic lives happily with his wife, two sons and an adopted son. Unfortunate incidents ensue when one of his sons falls in love with a rich girl and decides to marry her.

programme.title: Nikhonj The Search Begins
programme.desc: When Tanaya's husband suddenly stops responding to her texts and calls, she travels to London only to find him missing. With a cab driver by her side, she pledges to find her spouse.

programme.title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev
programme.desc: S1 , E1457 : Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.
